message:
feat(cli): add resources and gc commands for resource management

- Add `stockyard resources` command to show all resources:
  - Tasks from daemon
  - VM directories
  - ZFS datasets (VMs and workspaces)
  - TAP interfaces
  - Identifies orphaned resources not tracked by daemon

- Add `stockyard gc` command to clean up resources:
  - `--all` cleans stopped tasks via daemon
  - `--orphans` cleans orphaned resources directly
  - `--force` skips confirmation
  - `--dry-run` shows what would be cleaned
  - Safely skips running VMs

- Fix grpc.go StopTask and DestroyTask to use TaskManager
  - Previously only updated state, didn't actually stop/delete VMs
  - Now properly stops VM processes and cleans up resources

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
